ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Noodles (92%) {_WHEAT FLOUR_, refined palm oil (contains antioxidant: tertiary butylhydroquinone), salt, acidity regulator (potassium carbonate, sodium carbonate, polyphosphates), thickener (guar gum), vitamin B2 (riboflavin).} Seasoning powder (7,6%) {salt, sugar, flavour enhancer (monosodium glutamate), artificial beef flavour powder, yeast extract, leek, pepper powder, _CELERY_ powder, acidity regulator (citric acid), garlic powder, caramel, onion powder.} Chili powder (0,4%).
